Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe << 'PYEOF'
with open\('src/operation_rules/engine.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# Find the start and end lines for replacement
start = None
end = None
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    if 'Calcola budget rischio e size' in line and start is None:
        start = i
    if line.strip\(\).startswith\('return OperationalSignal\('\) and start is not None:
        # Find the closing paren
        end = i
        break

print\(f'start={start}, end={end}'\)
print\('START LINE:', repr\(lines[start]\)\)
print\('END LINE:', repr\(lines[end]\)\)

# Find the actual closing line of return OperationalSignal\(...\)
close = None
for i in range\(end, len\(lines\)\):
    if lines[i].strip\(\) == '\)':
        close = i
        break
print\(f'close={close}'\)
print\('CLOSE LINE:', repr\(lines[close]\)\)
PYEOF)
